content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Nextiva: Principal Product Manager (Omnichannel CX) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States (Remote) </p> <div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><h3>&nbsp;</h3><br><p class="x_elementtoproof"><strong><span><span>Redefine the future of customer experiences. One conversation at a time.</span><br></span></strong></p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">At Nextiva, we’re reimagining how businesses connect, bringing together customer experience and team collaboration on a single, conversation centric platform. Powered by AI, driven by human innovation.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">Our culture is forward thinking, customer obsessed and built on the belief that meaningful connections drive better business outcomes. Whether it’s through our signature Amazing Service®, the technology we create, or the experiences we cultivate, connection is at the core of who we are.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">If you’re ready to collaborate with incredible people, make an impact, and help businesses everywhere deliver truly amazing experiences, this is where you belong.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof"><span><strong>Build Amazing. Deliver Amazing. Live Amazing. Be Amazing.</strong></span></p><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><h3>&nbsp;</h3><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><br><p>We're looking for a strategic, hands-on senior-level Product Manager to lead the evolution of our Omnichannel Customer Experience platform. You'll drive the vision and execution for our next-generation shared inbox, personal inbox, and digital channel integrations—transforming traditional contact center communication into seamless, intelligent, omnichannel experiences. You'll own critical initiatives including ticket workflows, all channels including social media, group messaging, and intelligent disposition management that enhance agent productivity, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency across all digital touchpoints including email, SMS, social media, messaging platforms, and video channels.</p><br><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p><br><p><strong>1. Strategic Ownership</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Define the long-term product strategy for Omnichannel CX capabilities, ensuring unified customer engagement across voice, digital messaging (SMS, social, email), video, and emerging channels</li><br><li>Drive the dual-inbox vision: transforming shared inbox for team collaboration and personal inbox for individual agent efficiency—both into intelligent, AI-powered omnichannel engagement hubs</li><br><li>Deeply understand user needs across contact center agents, supervisors, and administrators; embed voice-of-customer insights and competitive intelligence in every decision</li><br><li>Partner with Finance and Sales to inform packaging and monetization decisions for omnichannel capabilities (stand-alone vs. bundle tiers) using data-driven insights</li><br><li>Design seamless experiences across Twitter/X, Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, SMS, email, and video channels with consistent inbox paradigms</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>2. Execution &amp; Delivery</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Translate strategy into a data-informed roadmap prioritizing high-impact features:</li><br><li>Shared Inbox capabilities: Split Ticket &amp; Merge Ticket workflows for efficient team-based case management</li><br><li>Personal Inbox optimization: Individual agent workspace for managing assigned work and personal queues efficiently with laser focus on user experience.</li><br><li>Group SMS capabilities for shared inbox collaboration</li><br><li>Design rapid agent response across all channels</li><br><li>Enhanced disposition widgets and lifecycle management</li><br><li>Design roles and permissions management for omnichannel across multi-tiered accounts</li><br><li>Omnichannel routing intelligence: smart assignment with AI powered real-time context across channels</li><br><li>Collaborate closely with Engineering, Design, and GTM teams to deliver high-impact releases; establish OKRs linking customer outcomes to business goals</li><br><li>Navigate technical dependencies across admin and myhub systems to ensure cohesive delivery across shared and personal inbox experiences</li><br><li>Drive continuous iteration post-launch through telemetry, experimentation, and customer feedback</li><br><li>Balance innovation velocity with technical constraints - understanding when designs exist vs. require net-new development</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>3. Cross-Functional Impact</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Act as a connector across Product, Design, Engineering, Data Science, and GTM to ensure unified omnichannel experiences</li><br><li>Champion a culture of experimentation, learning, and accountability</li><br><li>Influence senior stakeholders through crisp storytelling and data-backed recommendations</li><br><li>Manage feature flag rollouts and phased releases to minimize risk</li><br><li>Drive alignment on effort estimation (Low/Medium/High) and release prioritization.</li><br><li>Coordinate with infrastructure teams on audio/video storage, streaming, and media processing requirements</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6+ years in SaaS Product Management, including 3+ years leading enterprise-grade contact center, omnichannel communications, or CX platform products</li><br><li>Proven success delivering ticketing systems, shared/personal inbox platforms, or omnichannel engagement tools at scale</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>With deep expertise in:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Digital channel integrations (social media APIs, messaging platforms, SMS/MMS, video platforms)</li><br><li>Ticket lifecycle management and intelligent routing/disposition across multiple inbox paradigms</li><br><li>Agent workspace optimization: designing for both collaborative (shared inbox) and individual (personal inbox) workflows</li><br><li>Content management: encoding, storage, streaming, thumbnail generation, and playback experiences</li><br><li>Rich media handling across channels (audio/video attachments, screen recordings, visual support content)</li><br><li>Track record of balancing technical complexity with user simplicity - delivering intuitive experiences despite backend architectural constraints</li><br><li>Experience working with distributed engineering teams, managing dependencies across UI, backend, media processing, and admin systems</li><br><li>Skilled in Agile delivery, feature flag strategies, and phased rollout methodologies</li><br><li>Strong analytical mindset for in
